name: Blue Dream
details: This strain produces a balanced high accompanied by cerebral stimulation and full-body relaxation.

name: Jack Herer
details: Jack Herer is a sativa-dominant cannabis strain that provides the perfect pairing of cerebral elevation and full-body relief.

name: The Original Z
details: Zkittlez is an indica-dominant mix of Grape Ape and Grapefruit that is crossed with another undisclosed strain to produce this candy-flavored strain.

name: Super Lemon Haze
details: Super Lemon Haze is a premium sativa strain.

name: Kush Mints
details: Kush Mints is a premium hybrid strain.

name: Bubble Gum
details: Bubble Gum is a premium hybrid strain.

name: OG Kush
details: OG Kush is the backbone of West Coast cannabis varieties. Its complex aroma profiles with notes of fuel, skunk, and spice carry through to the taste.

name: Granddaddy Purple
details: A famous indica cross between Purple Urkle and Big Bud known for its deep purple hues and grape-candy aroma.

name: Sour Diesel
details: Sour Diesel is a fast-acting sativa that delivers energizing and dreamy cerebral effects.

name: Girl Scout Cookies
details: GSC delivers a potent combination of full-body relaxation with a cerebral euphoria that leaves you feeling happy and stress-free.

name: Wedding Cake
details: Wedding Cake is a potent indica-hybrid with rich and tangy flavors with undertones of earthy pepper.

name: Gelato
details: Gelato offers a well-balanced high that hits both mind and body with dessert-like aroma.

name: Purple Punch
details: Purple Punch is the sweet and sedating union of two indica-dominant classics.

name: Pineapple Express
details: Pineapple Express is a sativa-dominant hybrid with a tropical scent redolent of fresh apple and mango.

name: Trainwreck
details: A mind-bending, potent sativa with heavy resin production perfect for fighting pain, stress, and anxiety.

name: Northern Lights
details: Northern Lights is one of the most famous strains of all time — a pure indica renowned for its resinous buds and fast flowering.

name: AK-47
details: AK-47 is a sativa-dominant hybrid with a complex bouquet and a long-lasting, cerebral buzz.

name: White Widow
details: White Widow is a balanced hybrid known for the explosive burst of euphoria and energy it brings.

name: Super Silver Haze
details: Super Silver Haze is a legendary sativa that delivers a long-lasting body sensation.

name: Strawberry Cough
details: Strawberry Cough carries an unmistakable fresh strawberry taste with a thick smoke that may cause coughing.

name: Amnesia Haze
details: Amnesia Haze is a sativa dominant strain known for its uplifting and euphoric effects.

name: Chemdawg
details: Chemdawg is a legendary strain with an intense diesel aroma and a potent, cerebral high.

name: Durban Poison
details: Durban Poison is a pure African sativa famous for its sweet smell and energetic, uplifting effects.

name: Gorilla Glue #4
details: GG4 delivers heavy-handed euphoria and relaxation leaving you feeling glued to the couch.

name: Runtz
details: Runtz is a rare hybrid strain made by crossing Zkittlez and Gelato that is celebrated for its creamy smoke and candy-like flavor.

name: Do-Si-Dos
details: Do-Si-Dos is an indica-dominant hybrid with qualities reminiscent of its parent, OGKB, with a potent, full-bodied effect.

name: Mimosa
details: Mimosa is a sativa-dominant hybrid cross between Clementine and Purple Punch with a citrusy aroma.

name: Cereal Milk
details: Cereal Milk is a balanced hybrid cross of Snowman and Y Life with sweet, creamy dessert flavors.

name: Mac 1
details: MAC 1 (Miracle Alien Cookies) is a balanced hybrid that delivers a euphoric, creatively-stimulating onset.

name: Ice Cream Cake
details: Ice Cream Cake is a delicious indica hybrid made by crossing Wedding Cake with Gelato #33.

name: Sunset Sherbet
details: Sunset Sherbet is an indica-dominant hybrid with an incredibly complex aroma characterized by notes of skunky citrus.

name: Forbidden Fruit
details: Forbidden Fruit is the mouthwatering cross of Cherry Pie x Tangie with deep purple and green hues.

name: Mango Kush
details: Mango Kush is a hybrid strain similar in appearance to the Kush family of strains but with the unique flavor of mango.

name: Lemon Skunk
details: Lemon Skunk is a zesty hybrid with a strong citrus aroma and an uplifting, energetic effect.

name: Purple Haze
details: Purple Haze is a sativa strain immortalized in Jimi Hendrix's 1967 classic song, known for its vibrant purple color.

name: Death Star
details: Death Star is a potent indica cross of Sensi Star and Sour Diesel that delivers heavy body effects.

name: Tropicana Cookies
details: Tropicana Cookies is a sativa cross of GSC and Tangie that delivers a citrus-forward flavor with uplifting effects.

name: Ghost Train Haze
details: Ghost Train Haze is a sativa hybrid with heavy resin production and powerful psychoactive effects.

name: Skywalker OG
details: Skywalker OG is a potent indica hybrid that provides a dreamy buzz and feelings of calm.

name: Headband
details: Headband is a popular cross of OG Kush and Sour Diesel, named for the sensation of pressure felt around the crown of the head.

name: Banana Kush
details: Banana Kush is a hybrid strain that combines the flavors of Banana and OG Kush with relaxing indica effects.

name: Tangie
details: Tangie is a refreshed take on the legendary Tangerine Dream with a citrus aroma reminiscent of fresh tangerines.

name: Moby Dick
details: Moby Dick is a massive sativa cross of White Widow and Haze known for its intense cerebral high.

name: Lavender Jones
details: Lavender Jones is a soothing hybrid with a delicate floral aroma and calming full-body effects.

name: Cherry Pie
details: Cherry Pie is a popular hybrid with dense buds and a sweet, sour cherry smell.

name: King Louis XIII
details: King Louis XIII is a heavy indica with earthy, pine aromas and sedating full-body effects that couch-lock you.

name: Fire OG
details: Fire OG is considered one of the strongest OG strains with intense effects lasting 2-3 hours.

name: Garlic Breath
details: Garlic Breath is a heavy indica hybrid with a pungent garlic and fuel aroma that delivers knockout body effects.

name: Animal Mints
details: Animal Mints is a balanced hybrid with a minty, cookie-like flavor and balanced cerebral and physical effects.

name: Biscotti
details: Biscotti is a potent indica-dominant hybrid strain made by crossing Gelato #25 with Sour Florida OG.

name: Papaya
details: Papaya is a tropical indica that produces dense, frosty buds with a sweet, fruity aroma.

name: Shark Shock
details: Shark Shock is an indica hybrid with high CBD levels and relaxing, body-heavy effects.

name: Platinum OG
details: Platinum OG is a heavy indica cross of Master Kush, OG Kush, and a third unknown strain delivering fast-hitting sedation.

name: Zookies
details: Zookies is a balanced hybrid cross of Animals Cookies and Original Glue with candy-like flavors.

name: Layer Cake
details: Layer Cake is an indica-dominant hybrid with a rich, creamy sweetness and deep physical relaxation.

name: Orange Cookies
details: Orange Cookies is a well-balanced hybrid with a pleasant citrus flavor and uplifting effects.

name: LA Confidential
details: LA Confidential is a fast-flowering indica known for its psychedelic effects and piney, earthy flavor.

name: Critical Mass
details: Critical Mass is a heavy indica cross of Afghan and Skunk #1 with high yields and relaxing effects.

name: Gushers
details: Gushers is an indica-dominant hybrid cross of Gelato #41 and Triangle Kush with tropical, candy-like flavors.

name: Permanent Marker
details: Permanent Marker is a potent indica cross of Biscotti, Sherb BX, and Jealousy delivering a knockout high.

name: Jealousy
details: Jealousy is a high-powered hybrid cross of Sherbert Bx1 and Gelato 41 with a creamy, dessert-like aroma.

name: Jokerz Candy
details: Jokerz Candy is a delightful hybrid with candy-like sweetness and a balanced, euphoric high.
